step_rationale: I148M variant influences lipid metabolism and lipoprotein composition; systemic metabolic axis.
mechanism: PNPLA3 variant modulates hepatic lipid remodeling and circulating lipoprotein lipid composition.

references.title: The PNPLA3-I148M Variant Confers an Antiatherogenic Lipid Profile in Insulin-resistant Patients.
references.journal: The Journal of clinical endocrinology and metabolism
